APPEARANCES:
Jessica L. Chylik, Esq. of THE EPSTEIN GROUP 863-5718, X-103, for defendants Miguel Galindo and Ronald Depontes, demurring to amended complaint
Karen Y. Uchiyama, Esq., 274-2033, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
* Counsel submitted copy of late opposition to the Court.
** A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: DEFENDANT MIGUEL GALINDO'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- Sustained with 5 days leave to amend. The Court further modified its previous ruling on defendant Ronald Depontes' demurrer which was heard on 11/10/03, Monday -- Demurrer sustained with 5 days leave to amend. The Court further ordered the future hearings of defendants' demurrers should be scheduled on the same day. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
